# Main Project

This chapter is the slide-by-slide guide to the BUSN 5000 Project:
**Exploring Pay Differences between Women and Men**.

## Outline (to be written)

- Project overview and learning goals
- Data: March 2024 CPS ASEC
- The 35-slide deck structure
- Slide-by-slide instructions (migrated from the current
  Instructions HTML)
- Point allocations per slide
- Line limits and write-up rules

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is a stub. Content will be filled in as part of Wave 2
of the project rebuild.
:::
